scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/schemas build && bun run --cwd packages/run-store build && bun run --cwd packages/evidence-store build && bun run --cwd packages/artifact-store build && bun run --cwd packages/trace-recorder build && bun run --cwd packages/run-reports build && bun run --cwd packages/operations build && bun run --cwd packages/harness-loader build && bun run --cwd packages/policy-engine build && bun run --cwd packages/gate-engine build && bun run --cwd packages/tool-broker build && bun run --cwd packages/memory build && bun run --cwd packages/eval-runner build && bun run --cwd packages/runtime build && bun run --cwd packages/adapters-cli build && bun run --cwd packages/adapters-mcp build && bun run --cwd packages/adapter-parity build
